names: Navinda Navishadhi Pathirage of Colombo in the Democratic Socialist Republic of Sri Lanka Notary Public do hereby certify
attest that the foregoing Instrument having been duly read over
explained by me the said Notary to the within-named KUSHLA RUWANPURA the executant therein named who is known to me in the presence of Wimal chandima Wettasinghe
Sandhamini Darshika Wettasinghe both of No. 178
Ragama who signed respectively as “W. C. Wettasinghe”
“S.D. Wettasinghe” the subscribing witnesses thereto both of whom are also known to me the same was signed by the said KUSHLA RUWANPURA as “K. Ruwanpura”
also by me the said Notary all being present together at the same time at Maha Nuga Gardens in Colombo on this Twenty-Seventh (27th ) day of August Two Thousand
